$comment: Shared regex source for route-class detection, consumed by check-permanent-delete-stepup.sh (jq -er), check-raw-sql-usage.mjs (C2, native JSON import), check-destructive-wrapper-derivation.mjs (native JSON import), and src/__tests__/proxy/route-policy-manifest.test.ts (native JSON import). Single source of truth so the .sh check and the vitest parity test cannot drift apart. Every consumer asserts each required key is a non-empty string before use (jq -er / explicit JS assertion) so a missing/null key fails CLOSED instead of silently corrupting the grep.
$deleteSignal-parent-cascades: deleteSignal includes parent-row deletes that CASCADE to password_entries per prisma/schema.prisma onDelete: Cascade: team.delete (PasswordEntry has no direct team FK, but TeamPasswordEntry does) and user.delete (PasswordEntry.userId -> User, onDelete: Cascade). tenant.delete is excluded: Tenant's relation to User is onDelete: Restrict, so a tenant cannot be deleted while it still owns users/entries.
